evidence: "Intricate, suspenseful and full of twists and turns."
"Bosch has been such an amazing ride with intricate story telling with noir feel of old Hollywood scripting to modern day crime."
"Intricate, suspenseful and full of twists and turns."
"This could have been told in 3 or four episodes."
"the acting is stellar, but.. there is so much gratuitous trauma and violence that the story is lost in all the visceral muck."
"the budget was $5k, the acting was solid and I was taken aback by the theme of good and evil, faith and forgiveness."
"I loved this movie but I must recommend that anyone who hasn't see 'Unbreakable' should see it first."
"I really enjoy James May's shows and this is one of his best."
"Redemption takes 40 years for a man imprisoned in guilt and remorse."
"Life is beautiful; sometimes it takes everything unraveling to figure out our purpose here."
"You need to stick with this little understated film."
"It was very odd, unpredictable and even absurd but thoroughly enjoyable."

summary: The user enjoys intricate and suspenseful narratives, particularly in the thriller and drama genres. They appreciate high production quality and emotional depth in storytelling, while expressing mixed feelings about pacing and brand loyalty.
